justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was stuck in a loop, with the agent repeatedly asking the same question after each unavailable slot.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of the agent's responses and the lack of proactive suggestions.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent successfully understood the user's temporal requests but failed to offer any alternative solutions or proactively suggest different times, leading to a very repetitive and unproductive conversation.
